phrases.intent_en: Ask what the current temporary exhibition is about
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me parler de l'exposition temporaire en cours ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh par-LAY duh lex-poh-ZEE-SYON tahm-poh-RAIR ahn KOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The CAPC is housed in a 19th-century colonial warehouse; its vast vaulted nave is itself a landmark of industrial architecture.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-il autorisé de prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL oh-toh-ree-ZAY duh PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lan-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography policies vary by exhibition; always check with staff before taking photos of artworks.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a map of the permanent collection
phrases.text_local: Auriez-vous un plan de la collection permanente ?
phrases.pronunciation: oh-RYAY-voo un PLAHN duh lah koh-lek-SYON pair-mah-NAHNT
phrases.cultural_note: The CAPC holds major works by artists such as Richard Long, Sol LeWitt, and Jenny Holzer.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the museum shop closes
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme la boutique du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur FAIRM lah boo-TEEK doo myoo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop stocks art books, prints, and design objects and typically stays open until museum closing time.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café in the museum
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a un café dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-keel-YAH un kah-FAY dahn luh myoo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The CAPC has a café-restaurant inside the historic nave that is popular with locals even without a museum visit.
